Would it make sense to store a pumpkin in a cabinet where it might not get enough air circulation?

It would not make sense to store a pumpkin in a cabinet where it might not get enough air circulation. Pumpkins need good ventilation to prevent moisture buildup and rot. It would be better to store pumpkins in a well-ventilated area, such as a pantry or on a countertop.
